---
title: "Difference-in-Differences in R Practicum"
author: "Alexander Dean"
subtitle: "Recitation Period 9"
institute: "Vanderbilt University"
email: "alexander.r.dean@vanderbilt.edu"
date: today
format: 
  revealjs:
    theme: dark
    footer: "Alexander Dean (Vanderbilt University)"
    slide-number: true
    embed-resources: true
    link-external-icon: true
    link-external-newwindow: true
    self-contained-math: true
    incremental: false
    self-contained: true
    citations-hover: true
    fragments: true
    scrollable: false
    transition: fade
    reference-location: document
fontsize: 32px
editor: source
---

## What We Will Cover Today

1. Implementing RDD identification strategy in $\texttt{R}$

## Today's Research Questions:

1. What is the causal effect of incumbency on voteshare?

## The Data:

1. Data from the `rdrobust` package.

## Resources and Package Manuals

1. [Causal Mixtape RDD Chapter](hhttps://mixtape.scunning.com/06-regression_discontinuity)
2. [rdrobust package manual](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/rdrobust/rdrobust.pdf)
